meaning: n.严峻,严厉,朴素,节俭,苦行
examples: War was followed by many years of austerity.
In the 1920s demand for American farm products fell, as European countries began to recover from World War I and instituted austerity programs to reduce their imports.
In October 2012 the Lithuanian people, apparently tired of austerity, ousted the ruling Christian Democrats.
But few Greeks see how the current strategy of austerity without growth can work.
